problem id: 23410e94
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  10100011 -> 00010001
  00011010 -> 10001101
  11000010 -> 11100001
  10010110 -> 11001011
  00011110 -> 10001111
  01100111 -> 01110011
  01101110 -> 10110111
  10110101 -> 10011010
  11000100 -> 01100010

query: 01010011
predicted answer: 01101001
